comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound open_book framed packet id and InteractionHand enum body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.
